name: Defender: Allow cloud-delivered protection
description: Enables cloud-delivered protection (MAPS) in Microsoft Defender Antivirus. Cloud protection provides fast, real-time analysis of new and emerging threats.

name: Defender: Submit Samples Consent (Legacy)
description: Legacy setting for automatic sample submission. Superseded by the modern SubmitSamplesConsent setting which includes additional granularity.
deprecation_notice: Use the 'policy_config_defender_submitsamplesconsent' record which includes the full value map and updated documentation. Deprecated since Intune Settings Catalogue update 2023-Q4.
